overall.description: First-person perspective walking through a dark forest at night in a video game. The player follows a narrow dirt path alongside a rocky cliff face before continuing deeper into the woods, illuminated only by a flashlight or torch.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow forest trail alongside rocky outcrop

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the forest path with a flashlight illuminating the rocky wall on the left

entered.detail: large rock formation running parallel to the path on the left side
narrow winding dirt trail covered with fallen leaves
slender tree trunk visible on the right side of the path
dense green shrubs and small plants lining the trail edges

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person walk along a narrow dirt trail in a dark forest at night. A large rocky cliff face dominates the left side of the frame while dense underbrush and tree trunks appear on the right. The path ahead is illuminated by a flashlight, revealing a winding trail through the woods.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest trail transitioning away from rock wall

events.description: large rock formation on left recedes from view as path enters denser forest area

agents.ego_description: continuing along the winding dirt path as the rocky wall falls behind and the forest opens ahead

segments.scene_description: The camera continues walking forward as the rocky cliff face on the left gradually recedes into the distance and eventually disappears from view. The path remains narrow and winding, surrounded by dense forest vegetation and trees on both sides, with the flashlight beam cutting through the darkness ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: deep forest path surrounded by trees

agents.ego_description: proceeding deeper into the dark woods with only the flashlight illuminating the path ahead

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows continued progression through the deep forest without the rocky wall. The path stretches ahead into darkness, flanked by dense underbrush and tree trunks. The environment remains consistently dark and enclosed, with the flashlight providing the only illumination on the winding dirt trail.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a dark forest, transitioning from a constrained path beside a cliff to a deep, enclosed woodland. It begins with a walk along a narrow dirt trail where a massive rocky cliff face dominates the left side of the frame against dense underbrush on the right. As the camera pushes forward, the cliff face gradually recedes into the distance and eventually disappears from view, leaving the path flanked by thick vegetation on both sides. The scene then shifts into the heart of the deep forest, where the flashlight beam becomes the sole source of light cutting through the oppressive darkness. Finally, the camera continues along the winding trail, now completely surrounded by towering tree trunks and dense brush.
